data.title: Minimal GA over Rule Graphs
data.description: GA on rule graphs. Fitness signal: given a fixed label, minimize variance in subgraph structures produced across different expressions with that label. Library entry is byproduct of convergence. Fixed GA primitives — self-evolution deferred. Start GA from generation zero with seed rules as initial population.
data.rationale: Load-bearing for empirical library. Without rule improvement, label-conditioned reproducibility is not achievable. Must precede traversal loop.
data.exit_condition: Rule quality improves across generations. Library entries stabilize. Seed rules begin to be displaced by library-informed rules.
data.risk: Burn-in cold start — empirical library is empty at training start, seed rules are the only available bootstrap.
